title: List models
prompt: List the models available in this workspace.
final_output: Workspace models are available and ready for inspection.

title: List workers
prompt: Check current worker health for this workspace.
final_output: Worker health looks stable with a healthy serving node.

title: Gateway stats
final_output: Gateway pressure is low and request latency is stable.

title: List instances
prompt: List the provisioned instances visible to this workspace.
final_output: There is one running instance serving the workspace.

title: List deployments
final_output: Recent deployments show a successful rollout for the selected model.

title: Provider status
prompt: Check provider connectivity status for this workspace.
final_output: Provider connectivity is healthy and the workspace still has quota remaining.

title: Usage summary
prompt: Summarize current-month usage and the last 7 days.
final_output: Usage is steady this month, with moderate request and token volume over the last week.

title: Quota status
prompt: Am I near my workspace quota limits?
final_output: Quota pressure is low and there is no immediate risk of hitting workspace limits.

title: Web search
prompt: Check the official RunPod status page and cite it.
final_output:
RunPod status looks healthy.

- The official status page reports no active incident.

Sources
- [RunPod Status](https://status.runpod.io/)

title: Vision analyze
prompt: Inspect this screenshot and explain what it shows.

vision_analyze.question: Inspect this screenshot and explain what it shows.

final_output: The screenshot looks like a healthy runtime dashboard with no visible incident banner.
